ascendc.comparison_note: 旧 FP16 profiler, 不代表新版 FP32 内核

correctness_notes.profiler_note: Parsed profiler data from old FP16 kernel. FP32 kernel profiler not yet collected.

ascendc.comparison_note: 旧 FP16 profiler, 不代表新版 FP32 内核

known_limitations.description: Uses bitwise_or (no logical_or API). Correct for 0/1 bool.
FP16 accum precision exceeds atol=0.01 for 384-element reduction (21/70). FP32 accum kernel available (70/70).
N=32 limits Cube utilization to ~48%. Torch faster at B≥16.
Auto-tiling FC4000 broken. 4D JIT compile timeout for large shapes.
Per-row AICPU dispatch originally ~3000 us. RC-3: torch.expand().clone() 33600x improvement.
B=64 performance 9245us vs Torch 2180us — needs optimization.
B=64 performance 5050us vs Torch 135us — GetValue/SetValue bottleneck.

ascendc_implementation_audit.note: All 11 operators have genuine Ascend C device-side kernels verified by source code AND correctness runs on NPU.

source.provenance: All profiler records carry source, source_kind, sha256, integrity, and comparable per entry.
